mitigations.mitigation_name: Deploy the pre-configured Snort inline between the FortiGate and the internal switch (LAN-side) so the IPS can immediately detect and block ICMP flood patterns and other malicious network floods.

Implement egress filtering and DoS/traffic-policing on the FortiGate: enforce protocol whitelisting for outbound traffic, apply per-host rate limits and packet/connection thresholds (including ICMP) and enable session limits so a single compromised host cannot generate high pps/throughput to the Internet.

args.command:
config firewall address
edit "UbuntuComputer"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall service custom
edit "ICMP-PERMIT"
set protocol 1
next
end

config firewall address
edit "ATTACKER_IP"
set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Deny_ICMP_from_Ubuntu_to_Attacker"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "caldera-br"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "ATTACKER_IP"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Deny_ICMP_from_Ubuntu_to_Attacker"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "ATTACKER_IP"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "Deny_Ubuntu_to_Attacker"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "ATTACKER_IP"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end

config firewall DoS-policy
edit 0
set interface "port2"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set status enable
set action traffic-shape
set log enable
set traffic-shaper "icmp-shaper"
next
end

config traffic-shaper service
edit "icmp-shaper"
set guaranteed-bandwidth 64
set maximum-bandwidth 128
next
end

config firewall DoS-policy
edit 1
set interface "port2"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "ATTACKER_IP"
set protocol 1
set status enable
set action block
next
end
